title: Akamai Guardicore Microsegmentation Policy Violation Alerts (`guardicore:network`)
spl:
index=microseg sourcetype="guardicore:network" earliest=-24h
| where match(lower(action),"(?i)violation|alert|warn")
| stats count by policy_name, src_asset, dst_asset
| sort -count
description: Violations show east-west traffic that should not exist; they are often the first sign of lateral movement.
value: Containment rules can auto-trigger when paired with SOAR.
implementation: Install the add-on, configure API polling intervals appropriate to API limits, and map assets to CMDB for enrichment lookups.

references.title: Splunkbase — Akamai Guardicore Add-on for Splunk

grandmaExplanation: We use network security tools to watch who accesses what, help prevent data leaks, enforce network isolation, and secure cloud and remote access.
cimSpl:
| tstats `summariesonly` count
  from datamodel=Change.Change
  by Change.user, Change.object, Change.action span=1h
| sort - count
knownFalsePositives: Microseg blocks from new app deployments, missing exception rules, or planned segmentation rollouts.
